title: Stewed Runner Beans with American Twist
description: A unique twist on traditional Chinese runner beans stew, adding an American touch with a sweet and savory flavor profile.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the diced carrots and cook for 3-4 minutes, until tender.
Add the runner beans and cook for 2-3 minutes, until slightly tender.
Add the diced tomatoes, beef broth, and soy sauce (if using).
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 15-20 minutes, or until the beans are tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped scallions (optional).
